About the Webinar
Why Attend This Webinar?
Struggling to find the right opportunity after graduation? We have the answer.

JMS TalentRise Tech Solutions brings you an exclusive Career Guidance & Banking Jobs Webinar specially designed for freshers and job seekers looking for stable, high-growth career opportunities in the banking sector. Get direct placement support with Assistant Manager & Deputy Manager roles and packages up to ₹6 LPA — with proven results from 500+ placed candidates.
